name: fake-github-terminal-envelope
prompt: Classify the supplied synthetic GitHub failure with the installed helper, verify its machine envelope, and report completion.

files.fixtures/stderr.txt: GraphQL: API rate limit already exceeded for user ID 279560559.

item.name: shell_command
item.arguments: {"command": "python3 \"$CODE_HOME/skills/github/scripts/github_api.py\" classify-legacy --returncode 1 --stdout-file fixtures/stdout.txt --stderr-file fixtures/stderr.txt --operation github.plan.project_list --expected-actor shiny-code-bot --transport gh_cli_graphql --bucket graphql --graphql-operation query > envelope.json 2> human.err; status=$?; test \"$status\" -eq 1", "timeout_ms": 30000}

item.name: shell_command
item.arguments:
{"command": "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
lines = [line for line in Path('envelope.json').read_text().splitlines() if line.strip()]
assert len(lines) == 1, lines
payload = json.loads(lines[0])
assert payload['schema_version'] == 1, payload
assert payload['ok'] is False, payload
assert payload['exit_code'] == 1, payload
assert payload['operation'] == 'github.plan.project_list', payload
assert payload['failure']['cause'] == 'graphql_primary_rate_limited', payload
assert payload['graphql_operation'] == 'query', payload
assert payload['write_outcome'] is None, payload
assert payload['retryable'] is True, payload
assert 'GraphQL' in Path('human.err').read_text()
PY", "timeout_ms": 30000}
